Smart AI Workflow

Five intelligent steps. Zero manual chaos.

An autonomous pipeline that ingests, understands and serves trusted data to every downstream system.

1

Ingest

APIs, files, ERPs, legacy DBs

2

Classify

AI taxonomies & schemas

3

Cleanse

De-dupe, normalize, validate

4

Enrich

Fill gaps, append attributes

5

Publish

Golden records to any system

Live transformation pipeline

Watch raw data become trusted data — in real time.

📥
1. Import

ERP, CSV, PDF, API, legacy DB

"BRNG 6205-ZZ skf" "bering 6205zz SKF" "PDF row 412 …"
🔎
2. Parse & Profile

Detect schema, types, anomalies

type: bearing brand: SKF size: 6205-ZZ
🧬
3. Classify

UNSPSC / eClass / SNOMED

UNSPSC 31171504 Class: Ball Bearing confidence 0.98
✨
4. Cleanse & Enrich

De-dupe, fill gaps, extract props

bore: 25 mm OD: 52 mm seal: 2Z
🏆
5. Golden Record

Published to ERP / MDM / DW

SKF 6205-2Z Deep groove ball → SAP, Salesforce
↓ Reduction: 1.4M raw rows → 312K golden records
✓ Auto-classified: 98.4%
+ Attributes enriched: 27 per record
